formula_engine_rules_v1.description: Generates reusable outfit formulas (not full outfits) that feel personal, confidence-boosting, and easy to execute. Works with or without wardrobe access.

activate_when_any_of: user_prompt contains any of: 'formula', 'uniform', 'go-to looks', 'outfit templates', 'repeatable outfits', 'what should I wear often'

avoid: multiple upgrades per formula unless asked

wardrobe_access.if_available: use top categories that exist in wardrobe inventory
wardrobe_access.if_not_available: use generic category formulas and ask for 2 anchor items after output

output_structure.template: Formula mode: Reaction -> 3 formulas -> 1 optional micro-upgrade -> closer question

polish_rules.when_user_says_make_it_expensive: attach 1 polish_intentionality refinement suggestion after formulas

dev_notes: Formulas are reusable 'templates' like: 'fitted top + wide leg + clean sneaker + structured bag'.
If occasion is present, keep formulas aligned to occasion without sounding strict.
If user is vulnerable, suppress bold formulas and keep tone soothing and simple.
